articles.title: ‘Country’ Joe McDonald, ’60s rock star, proud protest counterculture icon, dies at 84 - CNN
articles.description: “Country” Joe McDonald, a hippie rock star of the 1960s whose “I-Feel-Like-I’m-Fixin’-To-Die Rag” was a four-lettered rebuke to the Vietnam War that became an anthem for protesters and a highlight of the Woodstock music festival, died Sunday. He was 84.
